title: Multiuser broadcast chat redesign
description: Redesign nie from 1:1 DM relay to a multiuser broadcast chat room. All connected users share a single room. Messages go to everyone currently online. No offline queue. Identity is hash of key. Directory of connected users maintained by relay.
close_reason: Multiuser broadcast chat implemented: hash-based PubId, broadcast protocol, persistent directory, single-room fanout, chat-only CLI
